TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Qara Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Qara a niyaro', 119 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 294 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 54% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 158 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 46% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 136 ko tamdaw. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *ara itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *ara a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Qara Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Qara a niyaro', 119 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 294 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 54% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 158 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 46% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 136 ko tamdaw. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: *ara itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŋ ʦən no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u *ara a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
